member.name: M:AzureTranscription.Api.Controllers.TranscriptionController.StartTranscription(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Starts a new Azure Speech Batch Transcription job by uploading an audio file.
member.param: The audio file that will be uploaded and transcribed.
member.returns: Returns the Blob URL and Azure's transcription job response when the request is accepted.

member.name: M:AzureTranscription.Api.Controllers.TranscriptionController.AzureWebhook(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Receives Azure Speech Service webhook notifications after a transcription job has finished.
member.param: The JSON payload sent by Azure Speech Services.
member.returns: Returns a success response if the webhook payload is received and processed.
